name: ProjectInfo
summary: The ProjectInfo class provides project information about the currently open Tekla Structures model.

methods.name: GetBasePointByGuid
methods.summary: Gets a base point by given guid.

params.name: guid
params.doc: The guid of the base point.

returns.doc: If found, the base point, otherwise empty base point.

methods.name: GetBasePointByName
methods.summary: Gets a base point by given name.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the base point.

returns.doc: If found, the base point, otherwise empty base point.

methods.name: GetBasePoints
methods.summary: Gets all available base points as a list.

returns.doc: The list of available base points.

methods.name: GetCurrentCoordsysBasePoint
methods.summary: Gets the current base point, if set.

returns.doc: The current base point, if set. Otherwise null.

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all double properties for the ProjectInfo.

params.name: Values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetDynamicStringProperty
methods.signature: public bool GetDynamicStringProperty(string Name, ref string Value)
methods.summary: Gets a dynamic string property for the ProjectInfo.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: GetIntegerUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all integer properties for the ProjectInfo.

params.name: Values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetProjectBasePoint
methods.summary: Gets the project base point, if any set.

returns.doc: The project base point, if set. Otherwise null.

methods.name: GetStringUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all string properties for the ProjectInfo.

params.name: Values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Double.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref double Value)
methods.summary: Retrieves a double property for the ProjectInfo.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be retrieved.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The return value.

returns.doc: True if the value was returned successfully.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Int32.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref int Value)
methods.summary: Retrieves an integer property for the ProjectInfo.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be retrieved.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The return value.

returns.doc: True if the value was returned successfully.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, String.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref string Value)
methods.summary: Retrieves a string property for the ProjectInfo.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be retrieved.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The return value.

returns.doc: True if the value was returned successfully.

params.name: basePoint
params.doc: The base point to be set as current base point.

methods.name: SetDynamicStringProperty
methods.signature: public bool SetDynamicStringProperty(string Name, string Value)
methods.summary: Sets a dynamic string property for the ProjectInfo.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Double)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, double Value)
methods.summary: Sets a double property for the ProjectInfo.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, int Value)
methods.summary: Sets an integer property for the ProjectInfo.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, string Value)
methods.summary: Sets a string property for the ProjectInfo.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

properties.name: Address
properties.summary: The address information of the ProjectInfo.

properties.name: Builder
properties.summary: The builder information of the ProjectInfo.

properties.name: Country
properties.summary: The address country information of the ProjectInfo.

properties.name: Description
properties.summary: The description of the ProjectInfo.

properties.name: Designer
properties.summary: The designer information of the ProjectInfo.

properties.name: EndDate
properties.summary: The end date information of the ProjectInfo.

properties.name: GUID
properties.summary: The GUID field of the ProjectInfo.

properties.name: Info1
properties.summary: The Info 1 field of the ProjectInfo.

properties.name: Info2
properties.summary: The Info 2 field of the ProjectInfo.

properties.name: Location
properties.summary: The address location information of the ProjectInfo.

properties.name: ModelSharingLocalPath
properties.summary: The local folder for model sharing. Is null if not defined for the model.

properties.name: ModelSharingServerPath
properties.summary: The server path for model sharing. Is null if not defined for the model.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The name information of the ProjectInfo.

properties.summary: The object information of the ProjectInfo.

properties.name: PostalBox
properties.summary: The address postal box information of the ProjectInfo.

properties.name: PostalCode
properties.summary: The address postal code information of the ProjectInfo.

properties.name: ProjectNumber
properties.summary: The project number information of the ProjectInfo.

properties.name: Region
properties.summary: The address region information of the ProjectInfo.

properties.name: StartDate
properties.summary: The start date information of the ProjectInfo.

properties.name: Town
properties.summary: The address town information of the ProjectInfo.
